2603.20821.title: Compass: Optimizing Compound AI Workflows for Dynamic Adaptation
2603.20821.paper_summary: Compound AI is a distributed intelligence approach that represents a unified system orchestrating specialized AI/ML models with engineered software components into AI workflows. Compound AI production deployments must satisfy accuracy, latency, and cost objectives under varying loads. However, many deployments operate on fixed infrastructure where horizontal scaling is not viable. Existing approaches optimize solely for accuracy and do not consider changes in workload conditions. We observe that compound AI systems can switch between configurations to fit infrastructure capacity, trading accuracy for latency based on current load. This requires discovering multiple Pareto-optimal configurations from a combinatorial search space and determining when to switch between them at runtime. We present Compass, a novel framework that enables dynamic configuration switching through offline optimization and online adaptation. Compass consists of three components: COMPASS-V algorithm for configuration discovery, Planner for switching policy derivation, and Elastico Controller for runtime adaptation. COMPASS-V discovers accuracy-feasible configurations using finite-difference guided search and a combination of hill-climbing and lateral expansion. Planner profiles these configurations on target hardware and derives switching policies using a queuing theory based model. Elastico monitors queue depth and switches configurations based on derived thresholds. Across two compound AI workflows, COMPASS-V achieves 100% recall while reducing configuration evaluations by 57.5% on average compared to exhaustive search, with efficiency gains reaching 95.3% at tight accuracy thresholds. Runtime adaptation achieves 90-98% SLO compliance under dynamic load patterns, improving SLO compliance by 71.6% over static high-accuracy baselines, while simultaneously improving accuracy by 3-5% over static fast baselines.
2603.20821.paper_summary_zh: 複合 AI 是一種分散式智慧方法，代表一個統一系統，協調專門的 AI/ML 模型與工程化軟體組件進入 AI 工作流程。複合 AI 生產部署必須在不同負載下滿足準確性、延遲和成本目標。然而，許多部署運行在固定基礎設施上，無法進行水平擴展。現有的方法僅針對準確性進行優化，並未考慮工作負載條件的變化。我們觀察到，複合 AI 系統可以在配置之間切換，以適應基礎設施容量，根據當前負載在準確性和延遲之間進行權衡。這需要從組合搜尋空間中發現多個帕累托最優配置，並確定何時在運行時之間切換。 我們提出 Compass，一個新穎的框架，通過離線優化和在線適應實現動態配置切換。Compass 由三個組件組成：COMPASS-V 算法用於配置發現，Planner 用於切換策略推導，以及 Elastico 控制器用於運行時適應。COMPASS-V 使用有限差分引導搜尋及結合爬山法和側向擴展來發現準確性可行的配置。Planner 在目標硬體上對這些配置進行分析，並使用排隊理論模型推導切換策略。Elastico 監控隊列深度，並根據推導的閾值切換配置。在兩個複合 AI 工作流程中，COMPASS-V 在與徹底搜尋相比，實現了 100% 的召回率，同時平均減少了 57.5% 的配置評估，效率增益在嚴格的準確性閾值下達到 95.3%。運行時適應在動態負載模式下實現了 90-98% 的 SLO 合規性，較靜態高準確性基準提高了 71.6% 的 SLO 合規性，同時在靜態快速基準上提高了 3-5% 的準確性。
2603.20821.author: Milos Gravara et.al.
2603.20821.authors: Milos Gravara, Juan Luis Herrera, Stefan Nastic
